messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0028",
  "title": "2025Q1",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10"
}

Section text:
## 2025Q1

燕云十六声

iOS流水：12.82

玩家评分：6.7

武侠·动作

英雄没有闪

iOS流水：10.41

玩家评分：6.1

放置·策略·养成

美职篮全明星

iOS流水：4.19

玩家评分：5.0

2K·篮球·竞技

龙之谷世界

iOS流水：4.02

玩家评分：4.5

3D·动作·还原

时光大爆炸

iOS流水：2.40

玩家评分：4.5

国风·种田·模拟

龙息：神寂

iOS流水：1.43

玩家评分：6.5

魔幻·策略·3D

message.content: This section covers Q1 2025 mobile game market performance, providing iOS revenue (流水) and player rating (玩家评分) metrics alongside genre classifications for six titles: 燕云十六声, 英雄没有闪, 美职篮全明星, 龙之谷世界, 时光大爆炸, and 龙息：神寂. It supports retrieval for questions regarding: specific commercial and reception figures per game; comparative rankings by iOS grossing or user score during Q1 2025; and associated genre tags (e.g., wuxia/action, idle/strategy, basketball/competitive, 3D/action, farming/simulation, fantasy/strategy/3D). The data functions as quantitative market evidence for early 2025 mobile gaming commercial performance and player reception analysis.
